[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Eloy''' was an Imperial [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]. Along with [[Bevel Lemelisk]], he was one of the chief designers on the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] battlemoons, and by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was apparently the overall head of the [[Hammertong/Legends|Hammertong]] project, developing the battlemoons' superlaser prime weapons.

When [[Kellering]] contacted [[Manda D'ulin]] and her [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] team to secure their help in transporting Hammertong off-world, he told them that Eloy wanted them to reinforce the Imperial security team led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Drome]]. However, given the speed and firepower with which the Imperial guards subsequently attacked the Mistryl, it is not clear whether this was the truth.
